name: Wallace Carothers: The Architect of the First Synthetic Fibers
era: The Birth of Synthetic Polymers (1907-1938): The Bakelite Revolution

milestones.event: PhD at Illinois under Roger Adams
Joins DuPont (6 February) to lead fundamental organic research at "Purity Hall"
Neoprene: Arnold Collins isolates chloroprene under his direction (April); Julian Hill discovers cold drawing of polyesters
First nylon 6,6 synthesized under his direction by Gerard Berchet (28 February)
First industrial organic chemist elected to the National Academy of Sciences; the Carothers equation formalizes step-growth polymerization
Dies in Philadelphia (29 April); his daughter Jane is born that November
DuPont announces nylon to the public (27 October), sixteen months after his death
"Nylon Day" (15 May): stockings go on sale nationwide — 64 million pairs sell in the first year
